title: strophanthus bullenianus
intro: Strophanthus bullenianus, also known as the Bulle's strophanthus or the Bulle's heart, is a flowering plant species in the dogbane family Apocynaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include being a cardiac glycoside and having anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Strophanthus bullenianus include its potential to treat heart conditions, such as hypertension and tachycardia, as well as its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and to stimulate the nervous system. Herbal preparations of Strophanthus bullenianus include a tincture, an extract, and a powder that can be used to make teas, infusions, and capsules, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
